TENTATIVE DECISION - COURT'S TENTATIVE STATEMENT OF DECISION. PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1590, THIS TENTATIVE STATEMENT OF DECISION SHALL BE THE FINAL STATEMENT OF DECISION BY THE COURT UNLESS, WITHIN TEN DAYS, EITHER PARTY SPECIFIES CONTROVERTED ISSUES OR MAKES PROPOSALS NOT COVERED IN THE TENTATIVE DECISION (SULLIVAN-318)

STATEMENT OF DECISION - COURT'S FINAL STATEMENT OF DECISION. THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT SHIRLEY HOSKINS ON HER CROSS-COMPLAINT AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANT STANDARD ROOFING ON ITS COMPLAINT AND MECHANICS' LIEN CLAIM AND AWARDS HOSKINS DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $25,000 IN DAMAGES, PLUS ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS, ACCORDING TO PROOF. COUNSEL FOR HOSKINS IS ORDERED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A JUDGMENT CONSISTENT WITH THE FINAL STATEMENT OF DECISION (SULLIVAN-318)
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $2,746.61 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE SEP-15-2009, FILED BY DEFENDANT HOSKINS, SHIRLEY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HOSKINS, SHIRLEY RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT STANDARD CONSTRUCTION OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA STANDARD ROOFING COMPANY $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,000.00, TOGETHER WITH ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS ACCORDING PROOF, AS DETERMINED BY THE COURT, WITH INTEREST THEREON AT THE RATE OF TEN PERCENT (10%) PER ANNUM FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT UNTIL PAID. PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANT STANDARD ROOFING COMPANY TAKES NOTHING ON ITS COMPLAINT AND MECHANICS' LIEN CLAIM. SEE SCANNED DOC
